description: You are a researcher in a proteomics core facility preparing to analyze a patient's hemoglobin using LC-MS/MS. Perform an in silico trypsin digest of the human hemoglobin beta subunit (HBB) found in ~/UGENE_Data/hemoglobin_beta_multispecies.fasta (identifier P68871 or HUMAN). Export the annotated human sequence with the identified cleavage sites in GenBank format to ~/UGENE_Data/proteomics_results/hbb_trypsin_annotated.gb. Additionally, identify the resulting peptide fragments and write a summary report containing the amino acid sequences of the three longest fragments to ~/UGENE_Data/proteomics_results/trypsin_fragments_report.txt.
